metadata.title: TAT Bau - Premium Doors, Windows & Roller Shutters | Delmenhorst
metadata.description: TAT Bau supplies and installs premium entrance doors, energy-efficient windows and roller shutters for homes and businesses in Delmenhorst and the region. Design your door online or request a consultation.

hero.slide_0_headline:
Premium Entrance Doors
Designed for Your Home
hero.slide_0_subline: Design your aluminium entrance door online with our configurator—modern security, energy efficiency and professional installation from TAT Bau in Delmenhorst.
hero.slide_1_subline: From new builds to renovations: high-quality windows with the right glazing and frames for thermal comfort, sound insulation and lasting performance—supplied and installed by TAT Bau.
hero.slide_2_subline: Roller shutters add privacy, extra insulation and security for your home or business. We advise on options, take measurements and install with care.

door_section.title: Modern Entrance Doors
door_section.text: Your entrance door is more than just an entry point. It defines the character of your home and plays an important role in security, energy efficiency and architectural design. TAT Bau offers modern aluminum entrance doors that combine durability, security and elegant design. Customers can design their door individually using our online configurator. Whether you prefer a minimalist modern design or a timeless classic style, we help you find the perfect solution for your home.

door_benefits.title: Why Choose Our Entrance Doors
door_benefits.modern_design: Elegant aluminum doors with contemporary architectural aesthetics.
door_benefits.high_security: Advanced locking systems and optional fingerprint access solutions.
door_benefits.energy_efficiency: Excellent insulation for improved indoor comfort and energy performance.
door_benefits.custom_design: Choose colors, handles, glass elements and finishes to match your home.
door_benefits.cta: Talk to Our Team on WhatsApp

configurator_section.title: Design Your Entrance Door Online
configurator_section.text: Use our interactive door configurator to create your ideal entrance door. Explore different styles, colors and materials to find the perfect match for your home. Once you have designed your door, contact TAT Bau for consultation and professional installation.

products_section.title: Our Offerings
products_section.doors: Premium aluminium entrance doors with modern design, security and energy efficiency. Configure your door online.
products_section.windows: Energy-efficient window solutions for modern homes.
products_section.sun_protection: Improved indoor comfort and shading solutions.

work_section.title: Our Work
work_section.text: TAT Bau specializes in the installation of modern building elements. The company's primary focus is the installation of high-quality entrance doors. In addition, we install windows, shading systems and architectural glass elements for residential and commercial properties.
work_section.services: Installation of: Entrance doors, Windows, Sun protection systems, Roller shutters and exterior blinds, Renovation and modernization projects

contact_strip.title: Ready to Design Your New Door?
contact_strip.text: Create your perfect entrance door in just a few steps: use our online configurator to choose design, color, glass and hardware, then request a no-obligation quote. Prefer to talk it through? Contact TAT Bau for personal advice, on-site measurement and professional installation—we’re here to help you from idea to fitted door.

footer.brand_description: TAT Bau – your specialist for premium entrance doors and professional installation in Delmenhorst. We also offer windows, roller shutters and sun protection.

produkte.title: Our Products
produkte.intro: From premium entrance doors to windows, roller shutters and sun protection—TAT Bau offers a full range for residential and commercial properties.
produkte.doors_text: Premium aluminium entrance doors with modern design, security and energy efficiency. Configure your door online.
produkte.windows_text: Energy-efficient window solutions for modern homes.
produkte.sun_protection_text: Improved indoor comfort and shading solutions.
produkte.windows_detail: TAT Bau supplies and installs energy-efficient windows for new builds and renovations. From modern tilt-and-turn designs to fixed and sliding options, we help you choose the right glazing, frames and finishes for thermal performance, sound insulation and durability. We take care of measurement, supply and professional installation so your windows look great and meet current standards.
produkte.roller_shutters_detail: Our roller shutters provide privacy, thermal insulation and extra security for homes and commercial properties. Available in a range of materials and colours, they can be manual or motorised and are built to last. TAT Bau handles the full process: advice, measurement, supply and installation, so you get a solution that fits your building and your budget.
produkte.exterior_blinds_detail: Exterior blinds from TAT Bau offer elegant sun shading and weather protection. They reduce heat gain in summer, protect against glare and can be combined with other facade elements. We advise on systems, dimensions and operation (manual or motorised), and provide professional installation for a clean, durable result.
produkte.glass_walls_detail: Glass walls and facades create bright, modern spaces and connect indoors with outdoors. TAT Bau works with quality systems for fixed and openable glazing, including structural and sliding solutions. We advise on design, thermal and safety requirements, and handle supply and installation for residential and commercial projects.
produkte.sun_protection_detail: From awnings and pergolas to facade-mounted systems, we offer sun protection that improves comfort and reduces cooling needs. TAT Bau helps you choose the right type, size and operation for your property, and provides professional installation so your shading performs well for years.
produkte.cta_teaser: Tell us what you need—we'll advise on products, dimensions and installation.

ueber_uns.title: About TAT Bau
ueber_uns.subtitle: Your local partner for entrance doors and more
ueber_uns.intro: TAT Bau specializes in high-quality entrance doors and professional installation. We are your local partner in Delmenhorst for modern aluminum entrance doors, windows, roller shutters and sun protection systems for residential and commercial properties.
ueber_uns.mission: We supply, install and maintain premium entrance doors, windows, roller shutters and sun protection. From consultation and design to fitting and aftercare, we focus on quality materials and precise installation so your property looks great and performs for years.
ueber_uns.area: Based in Delmenhorst, we serve the Bremen region and beyond. Whether you are building new or upgrading an existing home or business, we offer on-site visits, measurements and full installation.
ueber_uns.value_1: We work with trusted manufacturers and install to high standards so every job is durable and looks professional.
ueber_uns.value_2: As a local business we are easy to reach and responsive. You get clear advice and a single point of contact from quote to completion.
ueber_uns.value_3: From entrance doors to windows, roller shutters and sun protection—we can coordinate your facade and security in one place.
ueber_uns.our_work_intro: A selection of our door installations and projects. Click any image to view full size.
ueber_uns.visit_text: We are happy to discuss your project in person or by phone and WhatsApp.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.content: Privacy policy content will be provided here.

1.q: What types of entrance doors do you offer?
1.a: We offer premium aluminium entrance doors in a wide range of designs: modern, classic, and custom configurations. All doors can be tailored via our online configurator—materials, colors, handles, and glass options.

2.q: How does the door configurator work?
2.a: Use our online configurator to design your door step by step: choose model, color, finish, handle set, and glazing. You can request a quote or contact us for professional measurement and installation.

3.q: What is the typical delivery and installation time?
3.a: Delivery usually takes 4–8 weeks depending on model and options. We then schedule installation at your convenience. Urgent orders may be possible for selected models—please ask us.

4.q: Do you install the doors yourselves?
4.a: Yes. TAT Bau provides full installation by experienced fitters. We serve Delmenhorst, the Bremen region, and beyond. Installation includes measurement, delivery, fitting, and a final check.

5.q: Do you also supply windows, roller shutters and sun protection?
5.a: Yes. Besides entrance doors we supply and install windows, roller shutters, exterior blinds, and sun protection systems for residential and commercial properties—all from one contact.

6.q: What guarantees or warranties do you offer?
6.a: Our doors come with the manufacturer’s warranty (typically at least 5 years). Exact terms depend on the product. We stand behind our installation quality and will explain warranty details when you order.

7.q: How can I get a quote or book a consultation?
7.a: Call or WhatsApp us on +49 176 62161501, email info@tatbau.de, or use the contact form. We can arrange an on-site visit, take measurements, and provide a no-obligation quote.

8.q: Do you work with private and commercial clients?
8.a: Yes. We work with homeowners, landlords, and commercial clients. Whether single entrance doors or larger projects (e.g. multiple units or facades), we can coordinate supply and installation.

chat.title: Frequently Asked Questions
chat.subtitle: We are happy to help
chat.welcome: Hello! How can I help you? Choose a question or type your own.
chat.fallback: For this question, please contact us at info@tatbau.de or via WhatsApp/phone at +49 176 62161501.

1.q: What types of doors do you offer?
1.a: We offer a comprehensive range: front doors, interior doors, glass doors and matching accessories. All doors are individually configurable.

2.q: How does the door configurator work?
2.a: With our online configurator, you can design your dream door step by step, from material and color to handles and glass options.

3.a: Delivery time is between 4 and 8 weeks depending on the model and configuration. Standard models are often available sooner.

4.a: Yes, we offer professional installation services throughout Germany. Our experienced teams ensure proper installation.

5.a: We provide a comprehensive manufacturer's warranty on all doors. The exact warranty period depends on the product and is at least 5 years.

6.a: You can reach us by phone or WhatsApp at +49 176 62161501, by email at info@tatbau.de, or via our contact form on the website.
